# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio sidecar injection disabled.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "service-name" . }}
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ include "service-name" . }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ include "service-name" . }}
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: 'true'
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: {{ include "service-name" . }}
        image: {{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "service-name" . }}
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ include "service-name" . }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ include "service-name" . }}
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: 'true'
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: {{ include "service-name" . }}
        image: {{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: policy/v1beta1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: {{ include "service-name" . }}
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ include "service-name" . }}
  minAvailable: 1
